data.title: New CEO Buys $15 Million In Stock, Berkshire Restarts Buybacks
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway has restarted its buyback program, as indicated by SEC filings. The company's new CEO recently purchased $15 million worth of stock, marking a return to its traditional practice of repurchasing shares.

data.title: NASA Updates Moon Mission Timeline, Taps Alliance For Key Rocket Part
data.description: NASA has made the decision to switch from Boeing to United Launch Alliance for its upcoming moon mission rocket, following a helium flow issue. This change has prompted the agency to update its timeline for the mission. The specific details and numbers regarding the timeline adjustment and the partnership with United Launch Alliance have not been disclosed. The news source, Investor's Business Daily, covered the story.

data.title: JD Stock Falls After Q4 Earnings Miss. Food-Delivery Battle Is Sinking Profits.
data.description: Shares of JD, a prominent e-commerce company in China, experienced a notable decrease following a substantial drop in earnings. The decline in stock value occurred after JD reported disappointing fourth-quarter financial results. The company's profits were negatively impacted by intense competition in the food delivery sector. This news was featured in a report on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Hub Group (HUBG)
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who experienced notable losses in Hub Group. If you are one of these investors and wish to explore your legal options, Wilson urges you to contact him directly. You can discuss your situation regarding Hub Group stock or options with him to assess potential next steps.

data.title: IWCE 2026 Announces Industry-Leading Speaker Lineup Featuring Public Safety, Government and Technology Visionaries
data.description: Las Vegas - The International Wireless Communications Expo has revealed an impressive roster of speakers for IWCE 2026, scheduled for March 16-19 at the Las Vegas Convention Center. The event will showcase renowned figures from government, public safety, emergency management, and the private sector discussing cutting-edge technologies, interoperability, and mission-critical communication tactics that are influencing the landscape of public safety. The lineup includes nationally recognized leaders who will delve into the future of public safety with a focus on emerging trends.

data.title: Bitfarms (BITF) gains ISS support for U.S. redomiciliation vote. ISS advises yes ahead of March 20 vote. BITF stock rises by 12%.
data.description: The Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has suggested that shareholders of Bitfarms approve the company's redomiciliation to the United States before the March 20 vote. This news has caused an increase in BITF stock by 12%. Bitfarms is also gearing up for a rebrand to Keel Infrastructure.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Oil Prices Spike; AI Leader Broadcom Jumps On Earnings News (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline amid a surge in oil prices, with a notable increase in the performance of AI leader Broadcom due to strong earnings. The market report covers this development with live coverage.

data.title: Evaxion Earnings Report: Q4 Overview
data.description: Evaxion (NASDAQ: EVAX) disclosed its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 09:28 AM. The key highlights from this release include surpassing estimated earnings by 89.47%, with an EPS of $-0.02 compared to the expected $-0.19. Revenue experienced a decrease of $122,000 from the corresponding period in the previous year. For further details on the earnings report, refer to the complete coverage accessible on Benzinga.com.
